rankings.reason: Best alignment with the futuristic 2050 vision, focusing on AI integration and seamless automated service for remote workers.
Strong practical focus on tech-enabled comfort, though it describes an existing airport rather than a 2050 vision.
Creative ideas for leisure, but lacks the professional, high-tech infrastructure focus required for a futuristic airport design.
Worst option; it describes standard, outdated airport procedures rather than a futuristic or innovative travel experience.
